name: Polyfactory
description: Simple and powerful mock data generation library for Python based on type hints, supporting Pydantic, dataclasses, TypedDicts, attrs and msgspec.

seo.title: Polyfactory — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Polyfactory: Simple and powerful mock data generation library for Python based on type hints, supporting Pydantic, dataclasses, TypedDicts, attrs and msgspec.

when_to_use: Generate mock data from Pydantic models with one call
TypedDict and dataclass factories for Python test fixtures
Override specific fields while auto-filling the rest
Bulk fixture generation for performance test seeding

pros: Generates mocks from Python type hints
Works well with pytest and FastAPI tests
cons: Random data can mask deterministic bugs
Complex nested types need custom factories
review.verdict: The right mock data tool for typed Python codebases, far ahead of factory_boy when you already use Pydantic.
review.best_for: Python teams using Pydantic or typed models who need fast fixture generation
review.not_for: Projects without type hints where factory_boy patterns fit better

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
